name: tidelog
description: TideLog — AI-guided daily planning and reflection for Obsidian

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy: cp main.js styles.css manifest.json /Users/haoyangs/Obsidian_test_vault/.obsidian/plugins/tidelog/ && cp main.js styles.css manifest.json /Users/haoyangs/Obsidian_test_vault/.obsidian/plugins/dailot/ && cp main.js styles.css manifest.json /Users/haoyangs/Obsidian_test_vault/.obsidian/plugins/ai-flow-manager/ && echo '✅ Deployed to vault'
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
